meta.title: 2013 Bradley Symposium Panel Discussion: Is Our Political Culture Undermining Freedom?
meta.description: The Bradley brothers understood that freedom requires a political culture that is not only friendly to individual enterprise, but that also nurtures critical commitments like personal responsibility, moral obligation and civic engagement. Is our culture reinforcing or undermining those commitments today, and what might we do about it?
